canonical_answer: A human finger with light skin tone rests against a plain white background. A nail polish brush with purple bristles applies a glossy light purple coat to one fingernail. Subsequently, a brush with pink bristles covers a different fingernail in a solid pink color. The polish appears wet and reflective during application.
